name: spinner-sensei
description: Learn a language from your Claude Code spinner — rotating vocabulary flashcards while Claude works. Zero token cost for rotation.

target_language.title: Target language
target_language.description: The language you want to learn. Only 'japanese' ships with a bundled word pool; other languages are generated on demand by /spinner-sensei:configure.

level.title: Difficulty level
level.description: Which words to show: N5 (beginner), N4, N3, or 'all' to mix every level. Exact-level filter for the bundled Japanese pool.

meaning_language.title: Meaning language(s)
meaning_language.description: Language(s) to show meanings in, comma-separated for more than one (e.g. 'english, chinese'). Supported for the bundled pool: english, chinese.

words_per_batch.title: Words per rotation
words_per_batch.description: How many fresh vocabulary words to load into the spinner each rotation.
